title: microtis media subsp. densiflora
intro: Microtis media subsp. densiflora, also known as the alpine onion orchid or the slender onion orchid, is a species of terrestrial orchid native to southeastern Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Microtis media subsp. densiflora include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's tubers are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, although further research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy.
